description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Morph

You pump blood through your rubber body at superhuman speed, steam rising from your skin. For 1 minute, you gain:

  • Your Speed increases by 20 feet.
  • A +2 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls with unarmed Strikes.
  • Your Strikes deal an additional 1d6 fire damage (friction heat).

When Gear Second ends, you become Fatigued until your next rest. You can use Gear Second once per combat encounter.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: The once-per-encounter limit and Fatigued drawback reflect the lifespan cost in the source material. Adjust as needed.
